name: AWC DCA6 Prescriptive Residential Wood Deck Construction Guide
extraction_hint: deck ledger attachment, joist/beam spans, footing, lateral load; AWC-copyrighted, cite by figure/table, never copy the tables

name: AWC Wood Frame Construction Manual (WFCM)
extraction_hint: prescriptive framing, fastening, and wind/seismic connections; AWC-copyrighted, cite by section

name: AWC Span Calculator and design tools
extraction_hint: official joist/rafter span tool; link the tool, do not reproduce its tables

name: APA - The Engineered Wood Association resource library
extraction_hint: panel span ratings, sheathing, subflooring; APA terms forbid AI training and redistribution, cite by publication only

name: ACCA Manual J / S / D (residential HVAC design standards)
extraction_hint: Manual J load, Manual S equipment selection, Manual D duct design; ACCA-copyrighted, cite the standard, never size by rule of thumb

name: Building Science Corporation document library
extraction_hint: moisture, air sealing, wall assemblies, climate-specific detailing; cite articles, respect their copyright

name: Gypsum Association GA-216 (application and finishing of gypsum panels)
extraction_hint: drywall fastener spacing, fire-rated assemblies; cite GA-216 by section

name: DOE Building America Solution Center
extraction_hint: public-domain step-by-step trade guides and diagrams (PNNL/DOE); per-image credit lines mark third-party images; A-Z index at ?items_per_page=All

name: DOE BASC minimum insulation requirements by IECC climate zone
extraction_hint: public-domain R-value-by-climate-zone restatement of IECC/IRC Table R402.1.2; authoritative source for insulation.json and build_calc rvalue_zone

name: PNNL guide to determining climate zone by county (IECC 2021)
extraction_hint: public-domain county-to-IECC-climate-zone table for FL and NC; PDF at osti.gov/servlets/purl/1893981; feeds fl-nc-specifics.json

name: OSHA 29 CFR 1926 Construction standards (eCFR)
extraction_hint: public-domain construction safety (fall protection, excavation, scaffolds, PPE); machine-readable XML/API

name: FEMA residential coastal and flood construction guides
extraction_hint: public-domain P-804, FEMA-232; flood elevation, coastal foundations, wind retrofit; link FEMA MSC for per-site BFE

name: CPSC public safety handbooks (guards, stairs, handrails, playgrounds)
extraction_hint: public-domain guard/stair/handrail dimensional guidance corroborating IRC R311/R312

name: USDA Forest Products Laboratory Wood Handbook + PS 20
extraction_hint: public-domain wood mechanical properties and PS 20 nominal-vs-actual lumber sizing basis

name: HUD USER residential construction and rehab publications
extraction_hint: public-domain residential construction, durability, and rehab guides

name: Florida FDACS termite and building code protection
extraction_hint: Florida subterranean termite soil treatment and Certificate of Compliance context for FRC R318

name: NREL openstudio-standards material and construction data
extraction_hint: BSD-3 (attribution): material-layer R-values and wall/roof/floor assembly definitions + IECC-aligned climate zone sets; raw JSON under lib/openstudio-standards/standards/**/data; feeds assemblies.json

name: Wikidata construction terms (CC0 glossary backbone)
extraction_hint: CC0 labels and descriptions for building components/materials/tools (P279* of Q1516079/Q22811462/Q39546); entity API wbsearchentities; feeds glossary.json; no attribution required

name: Wikimedia Commons construction diagram categories
extraction_hint: per-file CC/PD diagrams; record the exact per-file license and attribution in diagram-index.json before bundling
